addition.item: Added JoomTheme website and GitHub Issues support links to the module metadata and language description.

change.item: Renamed the module branding to JT Scroll Cards.
Updated the technical module element and frontend CSS scope to the JT naming scheme.
Updated README, update server metadata and release asset naming for the JT package.

fix.item: Updated the Turkish default intro text to avoid mixed English wording.

note.item: This changelog intentionally lists only the latest release.
